ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the district is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the district is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the district is located */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the district */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the district's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the district's location */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget of the district */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district that signed the contract */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., educational, operational) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, pending) */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the contract */,
  "contract_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contract */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date of the next renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., academic, operational) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the performance metric */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value for the performance metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "population_date" TEXT /* Date when the population data was recorded */,
  "population_type" TEXT /* Type of population data (e.g., total, student) */,
  "age_groups" TEXT /* Age groups distribution in the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution in the population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_data" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., performance, compliance) */,
  "sample_value" REAL /* Value of the sample */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample */,
  "sample_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the sample */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the sample (e.g., validated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_data" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., contract, safety) */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., meeting, not meeting) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance data was recorded */,
  "compliance_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for compliance */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Notes on compliance */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_data" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the state */,
  "num_districts" INTEGER /* Total number of districts in the state */,
  "num_compliance_meeting" INTEGER /* Number of districts meeting compliance */,
  "num_compliance_not_meeting" INTEGER /* Number of districts not meeting compliance */,
  "state_gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the state */,
  "avg_teacher_salary" REAL /* Average salary of teachers in the state */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_data_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES districts ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, district official) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the user is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (e.g., 1 for highest, 3 for lowest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., district, contract, performance metric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "resource_category" TEXT /* Category of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Level of the permission (e.g., 1 for highest, 3 for lowest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_permissions_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_compliance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance history entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., contract, safety) */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., meeting, not meeting) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance data was recorded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the compliance status */,
  "previous_compliance_status" TEXT /* Previous compliance status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change in compliance status */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_compliance_history_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance history entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., academic, operational) */,
  "previous_performance_value" REAL /* Previous performance value */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change in performance value */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_performance_history_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
